proposed_description: Choosing questo (near the speaker) or quello (further away) from distance cues in the sentence (qui/adesso vs laggiù/in fondo/all'orizzonte).

proposed_attributes.canonical_example: questo caffè (qui) vs quel palazzo (in fondo alla via)

rationale: The tree has demonstrative.discrimination as an aggregate stub but no leaf to hang items on. The dispatch names this exact id ('discrimination.questo_vs_quello'). I authored 5 grammar + touch of translation against it; a concrete leaf is needed so the markpoints resolve at production load rather than staying on the aggregate.
